## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content production, performance metrics, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 10 articles published last week, 8 in review, weekly output includes 2 new blogs, 2 refreshes, 3 additional pieces (pillar page, competitor comparisons, model hub pages)](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Performance metrics unreliable due to Google reporting issues; investigating potential GA4 tag problems](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Competitive landscape: Galileo (3.30k keywords) vs. Arise (905k keywords), but core topics are close; LLM visibility behind LangFuse/LangSmith/Arise, ahead of Braintrust/Vertex](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Scheduling

  - [10 articles published last week, 8 currently in review](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Weekly content output: 2 new blogs, 2 refreshes, 3 additional pieces (pillar page, competitor comparisons, model hub pages)](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Scheduled content now visible in Airtable, including Model Hub Pages, Overview Pages, Competitor Blogs, and Pillar Pages](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

### Performance Metrics and Reporting Issues

  - [Google Search Console (GSC) and Google Analytics 4 (GA4) data currently unreliable due to Google's reporting issues](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Investigating potential GA4 tag problems, though initial checks show page views and user activity still being received](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Non-branded and branded impressions have decreased, possibly due to Google's efforts to curb bot traffic](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Position data may be off due to impression-based calculations](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

### Competitive Landscape Analysis

  - [Galileo at 3.30k keywords vs. Arise at 905k keywords](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Gap partly due to Arise's extensive model review content](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Galileo close to competitors in core topics (evaluations, observability, reliability)](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [LLM visibility (via Scrunch): Behind LangFuse, LangSmith, and Arise; ahead of Braintrust and Vertex](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Low citations for Galileo and competitors in enterprise queries; larger companies (e.g., IBM) more prevalent](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)

### Content Strategy and Improvements

  - [Competitor comparison pages currently in blog format; plans to adapt into SEM pages for ads and eventually pillar content](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Third-party mentions in prompts mostly from companies' own roundup posts](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Model reviews and competitor comparisons scheduled for upcoming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)

### Administrative Updates

  - [Contract renewal signatory to be confirmed (previously Osman, now potentially head of finance)](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Scrunch access issues for Jackson to be investigated](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [New product marketing person created detailed battle cards (e.g., for Langsmith)](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jackson to finalize wireframe for competitive pages before going out of office](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Vivek to follow up with Scrunch team regarding Jackson's access issues](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Jackson to confirm contract renewal signatory with Connor/Jason](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Jackson to send over new battle cards (e.g., Langsmith) after confirming with Connor](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Vivek's team to incorporate additional information from Connor into scheduled Galileo vs. Arise and Galileo vs. Braintrust articles](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Continue monitoring Google reporting issues and investigate potential GA4 tag problems](https://fathom.video/share/c94sVddHdGv2s1WFb1s84cJzU4sFrz_b?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
